title: FINAL 2026 Oscar Predictions: COSTUME DESIGN
text: Erik Anderson's prediction article for the 98th Academy Awards taking place March 15, 2026 forecasts the Costume Design category winner. Anderson predicts Kate Hawley will sail to an easy victory with Frankenstein on Netflix. He notes that Hawley has achieved a clean sweep of every precursor including BAFTA, Critics Choice and the Costume Designers Guild. The full rankings place Frankenstein by Kate Hawley in first, followed by Sinners by Ruth E. Carter, Hamnet by Malgosia Turzanska, Marty Supreme by Miyako Bellizzi, and Avatar: Fire and Ash by Deborah L. Scott. The article suggests Sinners represents a potential competitive threat, described as a common refrain in many categories in this final stretch of awards season. However, the consensus support across major precursor awards strongly favors Hawley's period costume work for the Frankenstein adaptation.
